title: Executive Order 9801—Removing Wage and Salary Controls Adopted Pursuant to the Stabilization Act of 1942

flags.justification: A pure deregulation action terminating existing controls; no new authority is created.
No ongoing program is created by a termination of controls.
Single purpose: terminating wage and salary stabilization controls.
Removes a compliance regime rather than creating one.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A one-time termination action grants no ongoing authority requiring reauthorization.
Removing wage/salary controls is a substantive deregulatory action, not removal of a review or check mechanism.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
The order includes a careful savings clause preserving legal consequences for past violations while ending the regime going forward — well-crafted, no concerning broader effect.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
